prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在海南省综合科类最低录取位次分别为约409名→369名→360名→259名→240名，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近两年加速上升，202 5年基准位次约240名；该校在海南省综合科类招生计划：2021年20人→2022年25人→2023年20人→2024年20人→2025年14人，2025年已明显缩招；2026年计划进一步 缩减至7人（较2025年减少50%），大幅缩招将显著减少录取名额，加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排 名中哈工大本部2026年位列第12名，深圳校区共享本部顶尖工科实力与品牌声誉，属于国内顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情事件；抖音平台哈工大品牌热度为高热（总排名第10），短视频曝光量大，反映社会关注度高；2024年曾出现投档线暴跌相关讨论，但深圳校区在海南位次持续上升，未受明显影响。 哈尔滨工业大学拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、土木工程A等众多A类学科，与深圳 校区在海南招生的计算机、通信、自动化等工科试验班专业高度匹配，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业为工科试验班（未来信息）和工科试验班（自主智 能），涵盖计算机科学与技术、人工智能、机器人工程等当前社会高热专业方向；海南省2026年高考考生总数约78000人，较2025年67408人增长约15.7%，考生规模扩大将进一步 推高竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划大幅缩招50%、海南省考生规模显著增长约15.7%、学校顶尖 层次与高热品牌声誉、以及热门工科专业方向等多重因素，竞争压力明显加剧。在2025年基准位次240名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次将进一步前移至约188名，区间165–211 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约188名（区间165–211名），处于全省顶尖水平。建议位次在165名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档工科试验班（未来信息）；位次在165–188名之间的考生以二档工科试验 班（自主智能）为主攻方向；位次在188–211名区间的考生可尝试冲二档并做好保底准备。由于该校在海南招生计划仅7人且专业高度集中，报考风险较高，建议同时准备其他顶尖 985高校的备选方案。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this university in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 409 → 369 → 360 → 259 → 240, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with accelerated increases in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 240. The enrollment plan for this university in Hainan's comprehensive category: 2021: 20 students → 2022: 25 → 2023: 20 → 2024: 20 → 2025: 14, with a clear reduction in 2025. The 2026 plan further reduces to 7 students (a 50% decrease from 2025), significantly reducing admission slots and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese university rankings, HIT's main campus ranked 12th in 2026. The Shenzhen campus shares the top-tier engineering strength and brand reputation of the main campus, belonging to the elite group of domestic universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public incidents. On Douyin, the HIT brand has high popularity (ranked 10th overall), with high short video exposure, reflecting strong public attention. In 2024, there were discussions about a sharp drop in admission cutoffs, but the Shenzhen campus's rankings in Hainan continued to rise, unaffected. HIT has numerous A-level disciplines such as Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, etc., which highly match the engineering experimental classes (Computer, Communication, Automation) recruited in Hainan, demonstrating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 recruitment majors are Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) and Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence), covering high-demand fields such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Robotics Engineering. In 2026, the total number of Hainan college entrance exam takers is about 78,000, an increase of approximately 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool will further intensify competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, a 50% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, a significant 15.7% increase in Hainan's candidate pool, the top-tier level and high brand reputation of the university, and the popularity of engineering majors, competitive pressure has clearly intensified. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 240, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to further advance to approximately 188, with a range of 165–211.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 188 (range 165–211), at the top level of the province. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 165 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information); candidates with rankings between 165–188 should target Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) as their main direction; candidates with rankings between 188–211 can attempt to apply for Tier 2 while preparing backup options. Due to the university's enrollment plan of only 7 students in Hainan and highly concentrated majors, the application risk is high. It is advisable to also prepare alternative plans for other top 985 universities.
